description: This small neighborhood deli in South Philadelphia has been a community staple for nearly 30 years. The business generates annual gross revenue of $120,000 with a cash flow of approximately $20,000. The deli offers a variety of sandwiches, hoagies, and catering services for local events. The current owner is retiring after decades of running the business and is motivated to sell quickly. The sale includes all equipment, inventory, and a transferable lease with favorable terms. This is a turnkey opportunity for a new owner to step in and continue operations with an established customer base.
seller_motivation: Owner retiring after 30 years in business, motivated to sell quickly.

description: Charming flower shop located in a busy area of North Philadelphia. The business has been operating for over 20 years, with annual gross revenue of $90,000 and a cash flow of $15,000. Specializes in custom arrangements for weddings, funerals, and everyday occasions. The shop has a loyal customer base and strong relationships with local event planners. The owner is retiring due to age and is eager to transition the business to a passionate new owner. Sale includes inventory, delivery van, and a lease with 3 years remaining. Great opportunity for someone with a creative flair to take over a well-established business.
seller_motivation: Owner retiring due to age, eager to transition to new owner.

description: Established vending machine route with 15 machines placed in high-traffic locations across Philadelphia, including offices, schools, and gyms. The business generates $35,000 in annual gross revenue with a cash flow of $10,000. Machines are well-maintained, and locations have long-term agreements in place. This is a flexible, low-overhead business that can be operated part-time. The owner is selling due to retirement and a desire to relocate out of state. Sale includes all machines, inventory, and location contracts. Ideal for someone looking for a semi-passive income stream.
seller_motivation: Owner retiring and relocating out of state.

description: This small residential and commercial cleaning service operates in the greater Philadelphia area, focusing on recurring clients. The business brings in $50,000 in annual gross revenue with a cash flow of $12,000. It serves a mix of private homes and small offices with a loyal client base built through word-of-mouth referrals. The owner is retiring due to health reasons and is highly motivated to sell. Sale includes client list, cleaning equipment, and branding materials. This is a great opportunity for someone to take over an established service business with room for growth through marketing and expansion.
seller_motivation: Owner retiring due to health reasons, highly motivated to sell.

description: Established deli in a busy Philadelphia neighborhood, serving sandwiches, salads, and catering for local businesses. Annual gross revenue of $120,000 with a cash flow of $25,000. Owner-operated for over 25 years with a loyal customer base. Includes all equipment, inventory, and recipes. Business is turnkey and ready for a new owner to take over immediately. Great opportunity for someone looking to step into a stable, small operation with consistent income.
seller_motivation: Owner retiring after 25 years in business, looking to spend more time with family.

description: Profitable vending machine route with 15 machines placed in high-traffic locations across South Philadelphia. Machines are fully owned (no leases) and include snack and drink options. Gross revenue of $40,000 annually with a net cash flow of $15,000. Route takes approximately 10-15 hours per week to service, ideal for a semi-passive income stream. All machines are in good working condition, and locations have long-term agreements in place.
seller_motivation: Owner is a baby boomer looking to retire and relocate out of state.

description: Small residential and commercial cleaning business servicing North Philadelphia and surrounding areas. Gross revenue of $75,000 per year with a cash flow of $20,000. Business comes with a client list of over 30 recurring customers, a website, and all necessary equipment. Owner currently manages operations and scheduling, with 3 part-time cleaners handling the work. Perfect for an owner-operator or someone looking to expand an existing cleaning business.
seller_motivation: Owner retiring due to age and health concerns, wants to pass on the business to someone motivated.

description: Charming flower shop in East Philadelphia with a strong reputation for weddings, events, and daily arrangements. Annual gross revenue of $60,000 with a cash flow of $18,000. Established in 1998, this business has a loyal customer base and contracts with local event planners. Includes inventory, a small delivery van, and a leased storefront with favorable terms. Owner willing to train for a smooth transition. Great opportunity for someone passionate about floral design.
seller_motivation: Owner is a baby boomer retiring after decades in the business, seeking a slower pace of life.

description: This small dry cleaning business in Philadelphia has been operating for over 25 years. The owner is retiring due to health concerns and is motivated to sell quickly. The business generates an annual gross revenue of $80,000 with a cash flow of $20,000. It includes all necessary equipment, a loyal customer base in a busy neighborhood, and a lease with favorable terms. Minimal staff required, currently employing 2 part-time workers. Great opportunity for a hands-on owner-operator to step in and maintain or grow the business.
seller_motivation: Retiring due to health concerns, motivated to sell quickly

description: A well-established convenience store in a residential area of Philadelphia is for sale. The owner, a baby boomer, is retiring after 22 years of operation due to health issues and a desire for a slower lifestyle. The store grosses $120,000 annually with a cash flow of $25,000. It offers basic groceries, snacks, and household items, with potential to expand hours or add services like lottery or deli. The sale includes inventory and equipment. Current staffing includes 1 full-time and 1 part-time employee. Lease is transferable with reasonable rent.
seller_motivation: Retiring due to health issues and seeking a slower lifestyle

description: This home-based bookkeeping service caters to small businesses in the Philadelphia area. The owner is selling due to health reasons and a desire to retire after nearly two decades of operation. The business brings in $40,000 in annual revenue with a cash flow of $15,000. It serves a steady client base of 10-15 small businesses with monthly bookkeeping and tax preparation services. Minimal overhead as it is run from home, and the client list and software subscriptions are included in the sale. Perfect for someone with accounting skills looking for a flexible, low-cost business.
seller_motivation: Selling due to health reasons and retirement

description: This semi-absentee vending machine route in Philadelphia consists of 15 machines placed in high-traffic locations such as offices, schools, and gyms. The business generates a steady annual gross revenue of $50,000 with a cash flow of $18,000 after expenses. The current owner spends approximately 10 hours per week managing restocking and maintenance, with a part-time helper assisting. Machines are in good condition, with some updated in the last 2 years. This is an ideal opportunity for someone looking for a low-overhead, recurring revenue business that can be run semi-absentee.
seller_motivation: Owner is retiring after 8 years of operation and wishes to spend more time with family.

description: This established laundromat in South Philadelphia has been serving the community for over 15 years. With an annual gross revenue of $60,000 and a cash flow of $20,000, the business operates with minimal owner involvement, thanks to 2 part-time staff members who handle daily operations. The facility includes 20 washers and 18 dryers, most of which were updated within the last 5 years. The owner currently spends less than 5 hours per week on oversight. This is a turnkey operation with recurring revenue from a loyal customer base in a densely populated area.
seller_motivation: Owner is selling due to retirement and plans to relocate out of state.

description: This semi-absentee residential and small commercial cleaning service operates in the greater Philadelphia area, generating $45,000 in annual gross revenue with a cash flow of $15,000. The business has a recurring client base with monthly contracts, ensuring steady income. The owner manages scheduling and client relations for about 8 hours per week, while 3 part-time employees handle the cleaning. All equipment and a branded vehicle are included in the sale. This is a great opportunity for someone looking to step into a business with existing staff and consistent revenue.
seller_motivation: Owner is retiring due to age and health concerns, seeking a buyer to continue the business legacy.

description: This snack distribution route in North Philadelphia serves 20 convenience stores and small markets with a variety of chips, candies, and beverages. The business grosses $40,000 annually with a cash flow of $12,000. The owner currently operates the route solo, spending about 15 hours per week on deliveries and inventory management, making it a semi-absentee opportunity if a driver is hired. The sale includes a delivery van in good condition and established supplier relationships. This route offers recurring revenue with potential for expansion by adding more stops.
seller_motivation: Owner is selling due to retirement and a desire to downsize workload after years in the business.

description: This dry cleaning drop-off store is located in a busy neighborhood of Philadelphia. It serves as a drop-off and pick-up point, with cleaning done off-site by a contracted partner, making it a low-overhead, semi-absentee business. Gross revenue is approximately $60,000 annually, with a cash flow of $18,000. The business requires minimal time commitment (15-20 hours per week) and has a loyal customer base. The owner is retiring after 15 years and is motivated to sell quickly, offering training and support during the transition.
seller_motivation: Owner retiring after 15 years in business, seeking to exit for personal reasons.

description: This mobile coffee cart operates in a prime downtown Philadelphia location with heavy foot traffic. The business grosses $35,000 annually with a net cash flow of $10,000. It operates semi-absentee, with the owner working approximately 20 hours per week during peak morning and lunch hours; a part-time helper could be hired to reduce involvement further. The cart comes fully equipped with all necessary permits and a loyal customer base. The owner is selling due to retirement and a desire to relocate out of state. Price includes all equipment and inventory.
seller_motivation: Owner retiring and planning to relocate out of state.

description: This residential and small office cleaning service in Philadelphia operates on a semi-absentee basis, with the owner managing scheduling and client relations for about 10 hours per week while two part-time employees handle the cleaning. The business generates $50,000 in annual gross revenue with a cash flow of $15,000. It has a solid reputation and recurring clients. The owner is retiring due to age and health concerns but will provide training and client introductions to ensure a smooth handover. All equipment and client contracts are included in the sale.
